title: antirrhinum majus var. hendersonii
intro: Antirrhinum majus var. hendersonii, also known as the Dwarf Snapdragon or Dwarf Honeysuckle, is a variety of the Snapdragon plant that is characterized by its compact growth and white or pinkish flowers. It has been used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties, which are thought to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and iridoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Antirrhinum majus var. hendersonii are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
